author: lOrm
content:
Applied root-cause fix (Category A): atomic write-then-rename + 0o600 permissions in InstalledPlugins::save.

Part 1 (atomic write): replaced fs::write(&path, json) with write-to-tmp -> fsync -> rename pattern using a static AtomicU64 counter for collision-resistant temp names (pid.nonce suffix, same filesystem as target for POSIX rename atomicity).

Part 2 (permissions): on Unix, set 0o600 on the temp file before rename (file never world-readable); set 0o700 on the parent directory.

Added 3 tests in save_tests module:
- save_creates_file_with_mode_0o600: verifies final file mode == 0o600
- save_is_atomic_concurrent_reads_see_complete_content: 50-write/concurrent-read loop, every snapshot parses as valid JSON
- save_cleans_up_tempfile_on_rename_failure: makes dir read-only to force rename failure, asserts no .tmp.* debris

Test count: 1215 (was 1212). cargo build: PASS. cargo clippy --lib: PASS (no install.rs errors). rustfmt: PASS.
